title: SMC-Based Crypto Trading Platform with Binance Integration and Position Monitoring

requirements.text: Implement a real-time market data dashboard that fetches Binance Futures USD-M ticker data (price, 24h change, volume, funding rate, open interest) via public API calls from the frontend browser, displaying data in a professional trading terminal style with dark neon theme.

quotes: Usaremos front end para comunicar com binance para dados de mercado. Análises e metricas.

acceptanceCriteria: Market data is fetched from Binance public REST API endpoints directly in the browser
Price, 24h change percentage, volume, funding rate, and open interest are displayed per symbol
Data refreshes automatically at a configurable interval (default 10 seconds)
Candlestick chart is rendered for selected symbol with zoom and timeframe selection (1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h, 1d)
Loading and error states are handled gracefully with user-facing messages

requirements.text: Implement Smart Money Concepts (SMC) indicators on the candlestick chart and analysis panels, based on the SMC trading books provided as knowledge base. Include: Order Blocks (bullish/bearish), Fair Value Gaps (FVG), Break of Structure (BOS), Change of Character (CHoCH), liquidity zones (buy-side and sell-side liquidity), swing highs/lows, and Premium/Discount zones.

quotes: Vc usara os livros de trading. Que eu forneci anteriormente como base de dados. Trading e mercado cripto. E smart money concepts.

acceptanceCriteria: Order Blocks are detected and highlighted on the candlestick chart (bullish in green, bearish in red)
Fair Value Gaps (FVG) are visually shaded between their high and low boundaries on the chart
BOS and CHoCH labels appear at the correct candle where structure breaks or changes
Liquidity zones (equal highs/lows, swing highs/lows) are marked with dashed horizontal lines
Premium and Discount zones relative to the current range are shaded on the chart
A side panel summarizes all detected SMC signals for the selected symbol with bullish/bearish bias

requirements.text: Implement classic technical indicators panel alongside the SMC analysis, including RSI (14), MACD (12/26/9), Exponential Moving Averages (EMA 20, 50, 200), Simple Moving Averages (SMA 50, 200), and Bollinger Bands (20, 2). Display computed values in a compact panel below the chart and overlay MAs and Bollinger Bands directly on the candlestick chart.

quotes: Indicadores técnicos baseados em Smart Money Concepts
indicadores clássicos (RSI, MACD, médias móveis, Bollinger Bands)

acceptanceCriteria: RSI (14) is calculated from OHLCV data and displayed as a sub-chart with overbought (70) and oversold (30) lines
MACD histogram, signal line, and MACD line are displayed in a separate sub-chart
EMA 20, 50, 200 and SMA 50, 200 lines are overlaid on the candlestick chart in distinct colors
Bollinger Bands (upper, middle, lower) are overlaid on the candlestick chart
Current indicator values (RSI value, MACD crossover status, MA alignment) are summarized in a compact panel

requirements.text: Implement browser-side Binance API Key and Secret Key authentication to retrieve the user's open futures positions and account balance. Store the API credentials securely in the browser's localStorage (never sent to the backend). Use HMAC-SHA256 signing in the browser to sign requests to the Binance private REST API endpoints for account and position data.

quotes: usaremos o sistema de comunicação chaves apis no browser para recuperação de posicoes abertas

acceptanceCriteria: A settings/credentials form allows users to enter and save their Binance API Key and Secret Key to localStorage
Credentials are never transmitted to the ICP backend canister
HMAC-SHA256 request signing is implemented in the browser using the Web Crypto API or a lightweight JS library
On successful authentication, the user's open USD-M Futures positions are retrieved from the Binance private API
Account total balance (USDT) and unrealized PnL are displayed in the authenticated section
An error state is shown if the API key is invalid, expired, or has insufficient permissions

requirements.text: Implement near real-time monitoring of open Binance Futures positions with automatic polling every 5–10 seconds. Display each position with entry price, current mark price, unrealized PnL (in USDT and percentage), liquidation price, leverage, and side (Long/Short). Show visual P&L alerts when a position gains or loses more than a configurable threshold.

quotes: monitoramento das posicoes em tempo quase que real
Alertas visuais de P&L por posição

acceptanceCriteria: Position data is polled from the Binance private API every 5–10 seconds using the signed credentials
Each open position card shows: symbol, side (Long/Short), entry price, mark price, unrealized PnL (USDT and %), liquidation price, and leverage
PnL is color-coded: green for profit, red for loss
A visual alert badge or animation appears when unrealized PnL exceeds ±5% (configurable threshold)
Polling stops gracefully if credentials are cleared or API returns an auth error
Last updated timestamp is shown on the positions panel

requirements.text: Apply a consistent professional trading terminal visual theme across the entire application. Use a dark background with high-contrast neon accent colors (green for bullish/profit, red for bearish/loss, amber/yellow for neutral signals). Typography should be monospace or semi-monospace for data values, with clean sans-serif for labels. Layout should follow a multi-panel trading dashboard structure.

quotes: Interface profissional estilo terminal de trading

acceptanceCriteria: All pages use a dark background (#0a0a0a or equivalent) with neon green, red, and amber accent colors
Numeric price and PnL data are displayed in monospace font
The dashboard layout uses a multi-panel grid: chart area (center), SMC signals panel (right), positions panel (bottom or side)
Bullish signals and profits are consistently green; bearish signals and losses are consistently red
The theme is applied consistently across all tabs and components

constraints: All Binance API calls must be made from the frontend browser — never proxied through the Motoko backend canister
API Keys and Secret Keys must be stored only in the browser's localStorage and never sent to the ICP backend
HMAC-SHA256 signing for private Binance API requests must be implemented entirely in the browser
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Automated trade execution (placing, modifying, or canceling orders on Binance)
Backend-side storage of API credentials or position data in the Motoko canister
Server-side proxying of Binance API requests
WebSocket real-time streaming (polling-based near real-time is sufficient)
Support for Binance Spot margin positions (only USD-M Futures in scope)
Social features, copy trading, or multi-user position sharing
